body: # ${1:{short title, representative of solved problem and found solution\}}

${2:{Describe the context and problem statement, e.g., in free form using two to three sentences or in the form of an illustrative story. You may want to articulate the problem in form of a question.\}}
Chosen option: "${6:{title of option 1\}}", because ${7:{justification, e.g., only option, which meets k.o. criterion decision driver | which resolves force {force\} | … | comes out best\}}
Generate Basic MADR.description: A template for documenting a basic MADR 4.0 ADR.

body: decision-makers: ${3:{list everyone involved in the decision\}}
consulted: ${4:{list everyone whose opinions are sought (typically SMEs); two-way communication\}}
informed: ${5:{list everyone kept up-to-date on progress; one-way communication\}}
# ${6:{short title, representative of solved problem and found solution\}}

${7:{Describe the context and problem statement, e.g., in free form using two to three sentences or in the form of an illustrative story. You may want to articulate the problem in form of a question.\}}
* ${8:{decision driver 1, e.g., a force, facing concern, ...\}}
* ${9:{decision driver 2, e.g., a force, facing concern, ...\}}
Chosen option: "${14:{title of option 1\}}", because ${15:{justification, e.g., only option, which meets k.o. criterion decision driver | which resolves force {force\} | … | comes out best\}}
* Good, because ${16:{positive consequence, e.g., improvement of one or more desired qualities, ...\}}
* Bad, because ${17:{negative consequence, e.g., compromising one or more desired qualities, ...\}}
${19:{Describe how the implementation/compliance with the ADR will be confirmed. E.g., an automated fitness function, an ArchUnit test, or a design/code review.\}}
## Pros and Cons of the Options

${33:{You might want to provide additional evidence/confidence for the decision outcome here and/or document team agreement on the decision and/or define when/how this decision should be realized and if/when it should be re-visited. Links to other decisions and resources might appear here as well.\}}
Generate Professional MADR.description: A template for documenting a professional MADR 4.0 ADR.
